    {

      "claim_id": "claim-fx-impact-unquantifiable",
      "claim_type": "hypothesis",
      "confidence": 0,
      "evidence_refs": [],
      "statement": "The exact earnings impact of a 10% stronger dollar cannot be quantified due to the absence of currency sensitivity data and geographic cost/revenue splits."
    }
  ],
  "handoff_notes": [
    "The request to quantify earnings impact requires specific inputs regarding foreign exchange (FX) exposure, which are currently unavailable in the provided evidence bundle."
  ],
  "missing_evidence": [
    "currency_sensitivity_data",
    "geographic_revenue_split",
    "geographic_cost_split"
  ],
  "uncertainties": [
    "The direction and magnitude of earnings impact from a stronger dollar depend on the net exposure (the delta between foreign currency-denominated revenues and costs). Without the geographic split, the net impact on operating margins and net income remains unknown."
  ]
}
